remarks: Modern Architectural Masterpiece - Nestled on 1.77 acres of lush, verdant grounds, this custom 2014-built estate is a triumph of contemporary design and sophisticated luxury. Spanning 5,630 square feet, the residence strikes a perfect chord between avant-garde architecture and residential warmth, characterized by soaring ceilings, premium finishes, an abundance of natural light and a Geo-thermal efficient energy system with radiant heat floors throughout. The meticulously curated interior features an open concept floorplan with generously proportioned rooms, four ensuite bedrooms, providing an unrivaled level of privacy and comfort for family and guests alike. While the indoor living spaces transition gracefully from formal galleries to casual retreats, the exterior is a true resort-style sanctuary. The expansive acreage boasts a heated pool, a discreet in-ground trampoline, Large terraces with fireplace and built-in BBQ's and a stylish pool house with kitchen, bath, stone fireplace and sleeping loft, all overlooking the serene, shimmering waters of a spring-fed pond. Complete with a detached 3-car garage and state-of-the-art systems, this modern gem offers a rare lifestyle opportunity within a community world-renowned for its prestigious schools and refined suburban charm.
